recommendations.title: Magic Beyond Words: The J.K. Rowling Story
recommendations.overview: A look at J.K. Rowling from her humble beginnings as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter book series.

recommendations.title: The Other Side of the Bed
recommendations.overview: When Paula leaves her mate Pedro, he misses her and looks for comfort with his best friends, Javier and Sonia. Paula is having an affair with Javier. Pedro tries to find who is the secret lover of Paula, and hires a private eye. Meanwhile, while comf

recommendations.title: Do It Like An Hombre
recommendations.overview: Raúl, Eduardo and Santiago have led a happy and "straight" life since their childhood, until, one day, Santiago confesses to them that he is gay.

recommendations.title: Get Married If You Can
recommendations.overview: Ana Paula catches her fiancé cheating. After a night of drinking, she wakes up far from home, not so certain she wants to go back.

recommendations.title: The Last American Virgin
recommendations.overview: The friendship of a group of young friends struggling with teen sex, drugs, and work is jeopardized by a romantic interest which may turn pals into bitter rivals.

recommendations.title: Extreme Movie
recommendations.overview: A sketch comedy movie about the joys and embarrassments of teen sex. But mostly the embarrassments.

recommendations.title: Grand Hotel
recommendations.overview: Guests at a posh Berlin hotel struggle through worry, scandal, and heartache.

recommendations.title: Nickel Boys
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the powerful friendship between two young Black teenagers navigating the harrowing trials of reform school together in Florida.

recommendations.title: Made in U.S.A
recommendations.overview: Paula Nelson goes to Atlantic City to meet her lover, Richard Politzer, but finds him  dead and decides to investigate his death. In her hotel room, she meets Typhus, whom she ends up knocking out. His corpse is later found in the apartment of David

recommendations.title: UHF
recommendations.overview: The eccentric new manager of a UHF television channel tries to save the station from financial ruin with an odd array of programming.
